tools.name: listFederations.getApiV2ListFederations
tools.description: Returns an array of all the available federations.

tools.name: listMarkets.getApiV2ListMarkets
tools.description: Returns an array of all the supported prediction markets

tools.name: performanceStats.getApiV2PerformanceStats
tools.description: Returns predictions accuracy in the last 1, 7, 14, 30 days.

tools.name: predictions.getApiV2Predictions
tools.description: This endpoint returns by default the next non-expired football predictions. URL parameters can be specified to show specific date in the past or future or to filter by federation and prediction market name.

tools.name: predictions.getApiV2PredictionsId
tools.description: Returns all predictions available for a match id.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
